comments: Reviewed result-review-packet.json and execution-contract.json, inspected git show --stat --name-status 830b3bd, and cross-checked execution-result.json/pre-flight-plan.json. Commit 830b3bd only adds task artifacts under tasks/v0.8.5-final-qa-and-docs/ (execution-result.json, pre-flight-plan.json, result-review-packet.json) and does not modify package.json, src/, documentation files, workflow/dispatch.json, iteration-state.json, or any active state model semantics. execution-result.json records the task as failed because Opencode subagent dispatch timed out, with no implementation_changes, artifact_changes, or closure_state_changes; pre-flight-plan.json documents the intended delegation strategy to preserve Strict SoD. This supports that the Orchestrator refused to hand-write code, bash test, or documentation patches after external Opencode timeout, and no out-of-scope implementation occurred in this patch progression. Note: the independent helper subagent requested during this review failed to launch due to unsupported model, so this decision relies on direct artifact and git evidence.
